description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe featuring a modern, urban design with a robust and chunky sole. The upper is primarily a mottled teal and gray synthetic material, accented by a darker green collar and heel, and reinforced with a black band wrapping around the back. Pale pink laces are threaded through metallic eyelets, providing a striking contrast to the otherwise muted color palette. The midsole is thick and segmented, with sculpted grooves and a layered construction that suggests both durability and comfort. The toe box is rounded and slightly reinforced, while the heel features a geometric cutout detail. The overall appearance is contemporary and stylish, suitable for streetwear or casual urban activities.
description: A modern high-top athletic shoe with a chunky, sculpted sole, teal and gray upper, and pale pink laces. The design is robust and stylish, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered teal and gray upper, pale pink laces, and the thick, sculpted sole with black and dark green accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pale pink laces, rounded toe box, and the symmetrical, robust build of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same layered materials and color scheme, with the black band and heel details more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the dark green collar, black heel band, and the geometric cutout at the back of the sole.
